name: agent-hud
description: Inspect local Codex and Claude agent threads inside VS Code.

agenthud.defaultProvider.description: Provider tab selected when AgentHUD opens.

agenthud.defaultSurface.description: Preferred VS Code surface for opening AgentHUD.

agenthud.codexListParseConcurrency.markdownDescription: How many Codex rollout files to parse in parallel when refreshing the thread list. `0` = automatic (bounded by CPU count, typically 2–8). `1` = serial. Larger values can speed up big `~/.codex/sessions` trees on fast disks but increase peak memory.

agenthud.codexListScanMaxRollouts.markdownDescription: Max Codex rollout files to parse per list refresh (newest first). `0` = use the extension default cap. Set higher if the status line warns that the rollout scan was limited.

agenthud.claudeListScanMaxSources.markdownDescription: Max Claude `session.jsonl` sources to fully index per refresh (newest first). `0` = extension default. Tail sessions may still appear if they are already in the parse cache.

agenthud.summaryCacheMaxSummaries.markdownDescription: Max Codex thread summaries written to global summary cache. `0` = extension default. Lower this if cache writes should stay small; the status line warns when rows are omitted.

agenthud.codexDetailMaxRolloutAttempts.markdownDescription: When opening Codex thread detail without a usable list `sourcePath`, max rollout files to parse (newest first). `0` = built-in default. Selecting a thread from the list usually opens detail via `sourcePath` and skips this scan.
